members.claim: The program is advancing through critical development milestones including completion of new compound synthesis and secondary screening by November 2025, hit-to-lead optimization and IP filings for novel scaffolds in Q1 2026, and in vivo validation in ALS, Huntington's disease, and Alzheimer's disease iPSC-derived models by mid-2026.
